title: Mekanism: Teleporter Security
body: **This mod requires [Mekanism](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism).**   ## Overview **Add Security to Mekanism Teleporter.** Only authorized personnel can teleport. It can be effectively utilized on a MultiPlayer Server.   ## How to use 1. Set the Security of Mekanism Teleporter to Trusted. 2. Add player names to be used in the Security Desk. 3. Let's try teleporting !   ## Important Notes Do not use the Override on the Security Desk.
